title: Add gateway /status CBOR power-field tests
description: Why this exists: t2hn.6.1 adds native gateway /status CBOR power-provider and valid-only power fields, but current tests cover HAL, app-interface, and Meshtastic paths rather than decoding the gateway /status CBOR surface. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware test harness or refactorable encoder test that asserts map count, buffer bound, provider availability keys, and optional battery/voltage/charging/external_power fields for absent and fully populated snapshots. Acceptance criteria: native_sim test decodes /status CBOR and fails if unknown telemetry is fabricated or if max optional fields exceed the fixed buffer.
notes:
Implementation in progress: extended lichen/tests/gateway_status/src/main.c, reusing the existing gateway_status native_sim/qemu harness and public lichen_gateway_encode_status_cbor() encoder. Added power fields to the local CBOR decoder (battery_provider, pmic_provider, battery, voltage_mv, charging, external_power), a definite-map count helper, absent-provider assertions, full-status power assertions, isolated power-only encoded assertions, valid-only omission assertions, and fixed-bound rejection coverage for buffers smaller than LICHEN_GATEWAY_STATUS_CBOR_MAX_SIZE.

Exploration/test design: agents confirmed status_cbor.c/status_cbor.h are the right no-hardware surface; production CoAP /status wrapper in apps/gateway/src/main.c is static and gathers HAL snapshots, while this Bead acceptance is about decoding the encoder output. Existing gateway_status zcbor decoder was the preferred pattern. Adjacent CBOR patterns checked in gateway_config and native_parse.

Validation on EC2 us-east-2a instance i-0d5fe303685991e8b with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr and clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-status-cbor; primary EBS worktree was dirty/behind and preserved. Host bootstrap-host.sh still fails on Ubuntu Noble awscli apt-candidate issue, so minimal build packages were installed explicitly; venv setuptools already 80.10.2. Local macOS native_sim remains Linux-only. Initial EC2 direct run caught a test-helper bug: cbor_map_count checked short-map major type before 0xb8 and misread b8 1f as 24; fixed by checking b8 first.

Commands/results after fix: git diff --check passed locally. west build -p always -b native_sim -d build/gateway_status lichen/tests/gateway_status -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed. west build -d build/gateway_status -t run passed: gateway_status SUITE PASS 100.00%, pass=9 fail=0 skip=0. west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-gateway-status-native --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed: 1/1 configs, 9 cases, 0 failed, 0 warnings, 20.55s. west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-gateway-status-qemu --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed: 1/1 configs, 9 cases, 0 failed, 0 warnings, 22.81s. Adjacent native_sim Twister: west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_config -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-status-adjacent-native --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed: 4/4 configs, 124 cases, 0 failed, 0 warnings, 102.77s. CBOR parser adjacency: west twister -T lichen/tests/native_parse -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-native-parse-qemu --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed: 1/1 configs, 15 cases, 0 failed, 0 warnings, 20.71s. Notable warning: Twister pkg_resources deprecation from Zephyr 3.7 tooling. gateway_status native_sim size: text=85166 data=1340 bss=13920 dec=100426 hex=1884a. Generated config includes CONFIG_LICHEN=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, CONFIG_ZCBOR=y, CONFIG_ZTEST=y, CONFIG_MAIN_STACK_SIZE=4096, CONFIG_ZTEST_STACK_SIZE=4096.
Final review outcomes: three independent codereview agents 019f21b9-d705, 019f21b9-d763, and 019f21b9-d7a9 reviewed the final one-file patch and found no P0/P1/P2 issues. Reviews specifically checked the CBOR map-count helper against production definite-map forms, expected map counts against status_cbor.c base/optional fields, valid-only omission assertions, provider-key assertions, fixed buffer-bound rejection, and decoder full-payload consumption. Non-blocking note: cbor_map_count is intentionally coupled to the current definite-length encoder forms (small maps and b8 one-byte map count), acceptable for this encoder-level test.
EC2 cleanup completed after validation: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr on i-0d5fe303685991e8b; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited until state=available; terminated instance i-0d5fe303685991e8b and waited until state=terminated; deleted temporary security group sg-0b802a33efd48bb3e.
close_reason: Added native_sim/qemu gateway_status CBOR tests for power provider keys, valid-only battery/voltage/charging/external_power fields, map counts, and fixed buffer bound; EC2 direct and Twister gates passed; three reviews clean.
